DeviceKind.description:
Kind of device requesting pairing — drives naming and display in the
caregiver space. Unknown kinds are tolerated.

oneOf.description: Kind added by a newer client.

description: `POST /pair` request (no token; only valid while the window is open).

code.description: 8-digit single-use code shown on the main screen.

device_kind.description: What kind of device this is.

device_name.description: Human name for the device (« Tablette du lit »).

title: PairRequest
